rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

formulas.result: (Math.pow(wallThickness, 2) / (Math.pow(Math.PI, 2) * Math.max(0.0001, termalDifuzyon))) * Math.log(Math.max(0.0001, (4 / Math.PI) * (erimeSicaklik - kalipSicaklik) / Math.max(0.0001, (50 - kalipSicaklik))))

hiddenLossDrivers: Waste in material or time indicates process improvement opportunity.
suggestedActions: Optimize drying/cooling process for cycle time reduction.
Monitor defects and adjust process conditions accordingly.

description.short: Calculate cooling time for plastic part to reach ejection temperature.
